overall.description: A cinematic nighttime walk through a foggy historic New Orleans-style street in a video game (resembling Red Dead Redemption 2). The clip begins with a streetcar passing by, continues through misty cobblestone streets where rain begins to fall, features a horse rider passing by, and ends as the camera approaches a building with distinctive red facade lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic street with tram tracks and commercial buildings

events.description: historic streetcar moves past camera from left to right along the tracks
camera begins walking forward down the street after the streetcar passes

agents.ego_description: initially stationary as the streetcar passes, then beginning to walk down the foggy cobblestone street

notable_agents.action: streetcar moving along tracks from left to right, gradually moving into the distance

entered.detail: historic tram with illuminated interior and 'CITY' visible on the rear
two-story historic building with 'PRODUCE STORE' signage and large windows
cast iron lamp posts emitting warm yellow light through the fog
metal rails embedded in the cobblestone street surface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a historic streetcar passing close by on foggy cobblestone tracks. As the streetcar moves into the distance, the camera begins walking forward past a produce store building, with warm gas lamps illuminating the misty historic street.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial street with wrought iron balconies

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the center of the foggy street between rows of historic buildings

entered.detail: ornate black iron railings on second-floor balconies of historic townhouses
weathered stone and brick facades with tall windows and decorative cornices

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking down the foggy historic street, passing ornate wrought iron balconies and masonry buildings. The street remains empty and quiet, with only the warm glow of gas lamps penetrating the mist.

events.description: rain begins to fall, visible as streaks in the lamplight and wetting the cobblestones
horse with rider approaches from the distance and passes by on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward as rain begins, moving slightly to the side to allow the horse to pass

notable_agents.action: horse with rider approaching from the distance along the street

entered.detail: tall stone wall with gated entrance appearing on the left side
mature trees with dense foliage becoming visible in the background

segments.scene_description: Rain begins to fall as the camera continues down the street, with droplets visible in the warm lamplight. A horse and rider approach from the distance and pass by on the right, while stone walls and trees begin to appear along the left side of the route.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined historic street with stone walls

events.description: street narrows significantly with large trees and stone walls creating an enclosed corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrower tree-lined section, navigating past stone walls and fences

entered.detail: pointed stone archway with iron gates on the right side of the street
building with distinctive red illuminated facade visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The street narrows into an enclosed corridor lined with stone walls and mature trees. The camera walks past a gothic archway on the right as a building with distinctive red lighting becomes visible in the distance, signaling the destination ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley approaching red-lit theater or saloon

events.description: approaching the red-lit building facade which dominates the end of the narrow street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the red-lit building at the end of the narrow alley

entered.detail: illuminated sign above the entrance with decorative lettering
red glowing lanterns flanking the entrance of the building
decorative wooden balcony with intricate railings on the left building

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the end of the narrow alley where a building with distinctive red facade lighting dominates the view. Ornate balconies and red lanterns frame the theater entrance as the camera moves closer, with the warm red glow mixing with the yellow gas lamp light in the rainy atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy, historic street that transforms from an open thoroughfare into a narrow, rain-slicked corridor illuminated by red light. It begins as a streetcar passes by on cobblestone tracks, moving forward past a produce store and under the warm glow of gas lamps that pierce the thick mist. As the camera continues past ornate wrought iron balconies and masonry buildings, rain begins to fall, visible in the lamplight just as a horse and rider pass by on the right. The scene then shifts as the street narrows into an enclosed path lined with stone walls and mature trees, passing a gothic archway that reveals a distant red glow. Finally, the camera approaches a building with distinctive red facade lighting and lanterns, where the crimson hue blends with the yellow gas lamps in the rainy atmosphere.
